# rl_common module constants
CHECKPOINT_TTL_HOURS = 48.0
CORRECTION_PATTERNS = {'I-meant': {'pattern': '(?i)^I meant\\b|^I said\\b', 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 60, 'strong': True}, 'I-told-you': {'pattern': '(?i)^I told you\\b|^I already told\\b', 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 120, 'strong': True}, 'actually': {'pattern': '(?i)^actually[,. ]', 'confidence': 0.55, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 45}, 'chigau': {'pattern': '^違う[、，,.\\s]', 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 90}, 'dont': {'pattern': "(?i)^don't\\b|^do not\\b", 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 60, 'strong': True}, 'dont-add-annotations': {'pattern': "(?i)don't (?:add|include) (?:comments|docstrings|type hints|annotations) (?:unless|to code)", 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 90}, 'dont-over-engineer': {'pattern': "(?i)don't (?:over-engineer|add extra|be too|make unnecessary)", 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 90}, 'dont-refactor-unless': {'pattern': "(?i)don't (?:refactor|reorganize|restructure) (?:unless|without)", 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 90}, 'dont-unless-asked': {'pattern': "(?i)don't (?:add|include|create) .{1,40} unless", 'confidence': 0.9, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 120}, 'great-approach': {'pattern': "(?i)that's what I wanted|great approach", 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'positive', 'decay_days': 90}, 'iya': {'pattern': '^いや[、,.\\s]|^いや違', 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 90}, 'keep-doing': {'pattern': '(?i)keep doing this|love it|excellent|nailed it', 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'positive', 'decay_days': 90}, 'leave-alone': {'pattern': '(?i)leave .{1,30} (?:alone|unchanged|as is)', 'confidence': 0.85, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 90}, 'minimal-changes': {'pattern': '(?i)(?:minimal|minimum|only necessary) changes', 'confidence': 0.8, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 90}, 'no': {'pattern': '^no[,. ]+', 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 60, 'strong': True}, 'only-what-asked': {'pattern': '(?i)only (?:change|modify|edit|touch) what I (?:asked|requested|said)', 'confidence': 0.9, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 120}, 'perfect': {'pattern': "(?i)perfect!|exactly right|that's exactly", 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'positive', 'decay_days': 90}, 'remember': {'pattern': '(?i)^remember:', 'confidence': 0.9, 'type': 'explicit', 'decay_days': 120}, 'souja-nakute': {'pattern': 'そうじゃなく[てけ]', 'confidence': 0.8, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 90}, 'stop': {'pattern': '(?i)^stop\\b|^never\\b', 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 60, 'strong': True}, 'stop-unrelated': {'pattern': '(?i)stop (?:refactoring|changing|modifying|editing) (?:unrelated|other|surrounding)', 'confidence': 0.9, 'type': 'guardrail', 'decay_days': 120}, 'thats-wrong': {'pattern': "(?i)that's (wrong|incorrect)|that is (wrong|incorrect)", 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 60, 'strong': True}, 'use-X-not-Y': {'pattern': '(?i)use .{1,30} not\\b', 'confidence': 0.7, 'type': 'correction', 'decay_days': 60, 'strong': True}}
DATA_DIR_UNIFIED_MARKER = '.data-dir-unified'
FALSE_POSITIVE_FILTERS = ['[？\\?]$', '(?i)^(please|can you|could you|would you|help me)\\b', '(?i)(help|fix|check|review|figure out|set up)\\s+(this|that|it|the)\\b', "(?i)(error|failed|could not|cannot|can't|unable to)\\s+\\w+", '(?i)(is|was|are|were)\\s+(not|broken|failing)', '(?i)^I (need|want|would like)\\b', '(?i)^(ok|okay|alright)[,.]?\\s+(so|now|let)']
INSTRUCTIONS_LOADED_FLAG_PREFIX = 'instructions_loaded_'
PJ_SLUG_NORMALIZATION_DATE = '2026-06-12'
PROMPT_CATEGORIES = {'code-exploration': ['structure', 'explore', 'codebase', 'directory', 'find.*file', '構造', '探索', 'ファイル', '読んで', '見て'], 'code-review': ['review.*code', 'review.*change', 'review.*impl', 'alignment', 'verify', 'コードレビュー', '変更確認', '差分'], 'config': ['config', 'setting', 'setup', 'env', '設定', '構成', 'セットアップ', 'readme'], 'conversation:approval': ['はい', 'いいえ', 'ok', 'いいよ', 'よろしく', '採用', 'accept'], 'conversation:confirmation': ['お願い', 'やって', '進めて', '対応して', '続けて'], 'conversation:direction': ['こうして', 'やめて', '変えて', '代わりに', 'ではなく'], 'conversation:question': ['なに', 'どう', 'なぜ', '教えて', '？'], 'conversation:thanks': ['ありがと', '感謝', 'サンクス', 'thx', 'thanks'], 'debug': ['debug', 'log', 'error', 'fix', 'issue', 'bug', '修正', 'バグ', 'ログ', 'エラー', 'なおせ', '直せ', '直して', '原因', '調査'], 'deploy': ['deploy', 'release', 'staging', 'production', 'stg', 'prod', 'ci/cd', 'pipeline', 'デプロイ', 'リリース', '本番', '環境'], 'git-ops': ['merge', 'commit', 'push', 'pull', 'branch', 'rebase', 'cherry-pick', 'revert', 'stash', '\\btag\\b', 'マージ', 'コミット', 'プッシュ', 'ブランチ', '取り込'], 'implementation': ['implement', 'create', 'build', 'write.*code', 'add.*feature', '実装', '作成', '追加', '機能', '作って'], 'research': ['research', 'best practice', 'latest', 'how to', 'pattern', '調べて', 'ベストプラクティス', '最新', '方法'], 'spec-review': ['spec', 'requirement', 'MUST', 'quality check', 'review.*spec', '仕様', '要件'], 'test': ['test', 'assert', 'pytest', '確認', 'テスト', '検証', '動作', 'ブラウザ']}
STALE_FLAG_TTL_HOURS = 24
USER_CONFIG_DEFAULTS = {'audit_interval_days': 30, 'auto_trigger': True, 'cleanup_tmp_prefixes': 'evolve-anything-', 'cooldown_hours': 24, 'correction_preflight_threshold': 3, 'evolve_global_allowlist': '', 'evolve_interval_days': 7, 'growth_display': True, 'idiom_autopromote_daily_cap': 10, 'language': 'ja', 'max_skill_count': 30, 'min_sessions': 10, 'slow_threshold_ms': 1000, 'spec_trigger_enabled': True, 'subagent_warning_threshold': 5, 'subagent_window_minutes': 5}

# rl_common public function / class signatures
StoreWriteError (no signature)
add_false_positive(msg: str, correction_type: str) -> None
append_jsonl(filepath: pathlib.Path, record: dict) -> None
calculate_confidence(base_confidence: float, text: str, matched_count: int = 1, has_strong: bool = False, has_i_told_you: bool = False) -> tuple[float, int]
classify_prompt(prompt: str) -> str
cleanup_false_positives() -> int
cleanup_old_checkpoints() -> None
detect_all_patterns(text: str) -> list[str]
detect_correction(text: str)
ensure_data_dir() -> None
extract_worktree_info(event: dict) -> dict | None
find_latest_checkpoint(project_dir: str | None = None) -> dict | None
get_preceding_tool_calls(session_id: str, n: int = 5, *, projects_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> List[dict]
hook_store_dir(base: 'Optional[Path]' = None) -> 'Path'
hook_store_path(filename: 'str', base: 'Optional[Path]' = None) -> 'Path'
is_noise_agent_type(agent_type) -> bool
is_user_config_explicit(key: str) -> bool
iter_read_data_dirs(canonical: 'Path | None' = None) -> 'list[Path]'
last_skill_path(session_id: str) -> pathlib.Path
load_false_positives() -> set[str]
load_user_config() -> dict
message_hash(text: str) -> str
noise_agent_type_kind(agent_type)
project_name_from_dir(project_dir: str) -> str
read_last_skill(session_id: str) -> str | None
read_skill_stack(session_id: str) -> list
read_workflow_context(session_id: str) -> dict
resolve_data_dir(env_value: str = '', default_dir: 'Path | None' = None, cc_plugin_data_base: 'Path | None' = None) -> pathlib.Path
sanitize_message(text: str, max_length: int = 500) -> str
should_include_message(text: str) -> bool
skill_stack_path(session_id: str) -> pathlib.Path
store_write(store_name: 'str', record: 'dict', *, guard_mode: 'Optional[str]' = None) -> 'None'
store_write_raw(filepath: 'Path', record: 'dict') -> 'None'
usage_skill_name(record: Dict[str, Any]) -> str
usage_timestamp(record: Dict[str, Any]) -> str
workflow_context_path(session_id: str) -> pathlib.Path
write_last_skill(session_id: str, skill_name: str) -> None
write_skill_stack(session_id: str, stack: list) -> None
